title: Chapter 20
content:
Chapter 20: Chapter 20: Absolute Cinema!

"Fufu... yes, I surveyed the surroundings and saw the hole, honey... what a despicable rat to do such a dirty thing to my husband." she spoke casually, as if nothing had happened.

"Woof!! Woof!!"

"Fufu... even Jack agrees with what I said." Morenne slowly walked behind his back.

After seeing that he was looking at the hole with his full attention, she licked her hands completely clean.

Nothing had happened... yes, absolutely nothing.

"Then let’s go... I’m already starving, Honey. Let’s go back home." The man stood up after he covered the hole with dirt; the pest hole was already fixed.

The sneaky one wouldn’t be able to get another chance anymore!

"Fufu yes, let’s go, although I’m already filled." she said as she walked forward, Morenne is really in a good mood now .

"Hmm... did you eat something? I don’t recall us buying any snacks." the man said as he followed her, quite confused to what she just said.

"Fufu never mind, let’s go honey! It’s almost noon." Her voice was laced with satisfaction.

Maybe it wasn’t bad, truly not bad.

Then... Morenne turned her head after her husband took the lead, and she gave a quick wink to Owen’s current location, well he is absolutely the rat.

And as a rat, he will slowly made his way, and ravaged the goods until he savored them completely.

Yet luck is raining down on the rat, as the goods wanted to be savored.

The voices of the two slowly disappeared, together with that good lad named Jack.

’Even giving me a wink... truly another level of MILF.’ That was the only thought that processed in his head after hiding away again, as he recalled the adversity he was in.

...

"Hoh, that was intense! I almost thought my cock would get cut off and buried in that hole." Owen wiped his forehead, which was flowing with huge beads of sweat.

The thing that had just happened was too dangerous, but everything went well in the very end.

A high risk, high return.

Either his cock got slice off and offered to the grains to become a fertilizer, that made Owen shivered as that thought in his mind, or...

Doing the deed with a pent up MILF in the back of the barn without her husband knowing!

Definitely, a high risk but at the same time high reward...right?

After Owen cummed and spurted his milky white seeds to Morenne’s mouth, he had jumped back like a real soldier in a true ordeal of war.

A commando who would enter a perimeter even if the hole was the size of a pin.

But who would have thought that Morenne would drink and swallow the cum like a being who had walked for countless days in the desert without water, only to find an oasis in the middle of nowhere!

Still... he didn’t dwell on the spectacle, as her swift movements were so smooth that her husband didn’t catch a single hint of what had just happened.

Absolute Cinema!

All hands up!

That was the only thing he could think.

Ding!

[Unique Quest Completed!]

[Title: Certified Commando!]

Rewards: MILF Token 10x / 150 Exp Points!

[Good job. You surprised even the beings from the void...You made those cultured readers fap in their own! (⁠ ⁠ꈍ⁠ᴗ⁠ꈍ⁠) ])

Owen smirked as he read another crazy remark from the system... it was already a common occurrence, so he expected it.

It wasn’t bad to have a slightly cringe yet funny system at times.

It’s not bad having a system like that, what could he never wish for?

A system that’s not cold and programmed robotic one is a perfect one.

Cringe or what, he doesn’t give a shit...all that matters is that he enjoyed the company of the system.

The system didn’t finish as another chimed echoed into his ears again.

Ding!!!

[Morenne’s Affection went up!]

[ Special Interest: 77/100]

"Sheesh... what a huge leap. It’s way too much compared to the meager value Arielle’s affection went up by."

Still... he speculated that a Special Interest was easier to raise than Family affection when following a fast-paced rhythm.

With enough effort and timing, he could jump the affection straight to the top; however, that logic only worked for certain targets.

Owen had even forcefully made a bold move on Arielle, but she had controlled her feelings and managed to escape his grasp. Well, he would try again tonight, so he wasn’t worried a single bit.

For now, he had another agenda to attend to.

He wanted to see the lake where the man, the MC and his father went... obviously in the game that he played.

Its the fishing area in the lake.

Maybe it was just because of a sudden whim... or maybe he just wanted to experience the beauty of the lake.

"My cock is still rock hard... I can’t get enough of those delicate hands. Hehe, I think we need to keep doing this dirty little secret at the back of the barn for a long while." Owen dusted off his clothes as he walked away like nothing had happened.

The owner was gone now together with the good dog named Jack, and Morenne had pointed out a shortcut to him to avoid getting caught out front.

...

Owen walked for minutes before arriving to the said lake.

"Whoah... what a good view." Owen stood looking at the mesmerizing, sparkling water of the lake, as the ripples reflected the bright sunlight.

"A village is not bad... away from the countless buzzing and bad air in the city...well back when I was still in the Earth." he mumbled like an old man, looking around until he found a comfortable grass field to sit on.

A slowburn, life should be taken slowly, enjoying the moment even if it was just something small and insignificant.

Piling up such insignificant moments that were completely filled with enjoyment wasn’t a bad way to live.

Twack... twack... twack...

He threw a flat stone across the water, watching as it bounced again and again until it finally sank down into the depths...
